# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
class UserAuthPlugin {
    private $wpdb;

    public function __construct($wpdb) {
        $this->wpdb = $wpdb;
        add_action('wp_login', array($this, 'user_logged_in'));
        add_action('register_form', array($this, 'register_user_form'));
        add_filter('registration_errors', array($this, 'validate_registration'), 10, 3);
        add_action('wp_insert_user', array($this, 'save_user_password_hash'), 10, 2);
    }

    public function user_logged_in($user_login) {
        $user = get_user_by('login', $user_login);
        if ($user) {
            // Perform actions on successful login
        }
    }

    public function register_user_form() {
        ?>
        <p>
            <label for="register_password">Password (required):</label>
            <input type="password" name="register_password" id="register_password" class="input" size="25" />
        </p>
        <?php
    }

    public function validate_registration($errors, $sanitized_user_login, $user_email) {
        if (!isset($_POST['register_password']) || empty($_POST['register_password'])) {
            return new WP_Error('empty_password', __('<strong>ERROR</strong>: Please enter a password.'));
        }
        return $errors;
    }

    public function save_user_password_hash($user_id, $user) {
        if (isset($_POST['register_password']) && !empty($_POST['register_password'])) {
            $password = $_POST['register_password'];
            $hashed_password = wp_hash_password($password);
            $this->wpdb->update(
                $this->wpdb->users,
                array('user_pass' => $hashed_password),
                array('ID' => $user_id)
            );
        }
    }

    public function user_login() {
        if (isset($_POST['login']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
            $username = $_POST['login'];
            $password = $_POST['password'];
            $user = get_user_by('login', $username);
            if ($user && wp_check_password($password, $user->user_pass, $user->ID)) {
                // Login successful
            } else {
                // Login failed
            }
        }
    }
}

add_action('plugins_loaded', function() {
    global $wpdb;
    new UserAuthPlugin($wpdb);
});
?>
